chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَ الْعُمْرَةِ وَ ثَوَابِهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Merits of the Hajj and the Umra, and their Rewards

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/133)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/133)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَا وَ رَبِّ هَذِهِ الْبَنِيَّةِ لَا يُخَالِفُ مُدْمِنَ الْحَجِّ بِهَذَا الْبَيْتِ حُمَّى وَ لَا فَقْرٌ أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Rabie Bin Abdullah, from Al Fuzayl who said,
‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘No, by the Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of this House (Kabah)! A habitual one of this House (Kabah) would neither be violated by fever, nor poverty, ever!’
en.sarwar: 32. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Husayn al-Ahmasiy from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One Hajj is better than spending a whole house full of gold in charity until it is finished.’”
